'''Byhdee Kees''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] who was active during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he was wanted by the [[Coruscant Security Force/Legends|Coruscant Police]] for questioning, relating to the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] of [[Death stick/Legends|death sticks]] on [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]]. He had known connections to the [[RavinsBlud Crime Syndicate]]. A bounty was posted on him, 3000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] alive, 1500 dead. While on Malastare, [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] secured the bounty.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
